title: ortholobium havilandii
intro: Ortholobium havilandii, also known as the Haviland's snailflower, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its distinctive snail-shaped flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Ortholobium havilandii include its potential to alleviate fever, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves are sometimes used in poultices to promote recovery and relieve discomfort.
